title: Hello Factory CLI
summary: Implement src/hello_factory.py (prints 'Hello from the Factory E2E project', exits 0), tests/test_hello_factory.py (pytest assertion on output), and a one-line usage note in README.md.

README.md contains a one-line usage note
acceptance_criteria: src/hello_factory.py prints exactly 'Hello from the Factory E2E project' and exits 0

No external dependencies beyond Python stdlib (production code) and pytest (tests)

required: python src/hello_factory.py — prints exact string, exits 0

validation.notes: Validation contract to be finalized by orchestrator during Planning Pass.

notes_to_preserve_for_orchestrator: Review tier: standard (two required review passes). Source code and tests cannot qualify for light tier per docs/workflow/review-tiers.md. Build request mentions 'light tier' but its success criterion shows two review passes, which is standard.
pytest may need installation: verify with `pytest --version` and install with `pip install pytest` if absent.
src/ directory may not exist: implementer creates it if absent.
Observability/logging are not applicable for this minimal throwaway script per Specification §5 and §11.
Non-goals: no CI changes, no edits to factory/workflow files or .roles/.
